pos_sentences.text: College campus is quite ok.Ease of admission is this college.
pos_sentences.name: College Ninja

pos_sentences.text: Faculties are amazing and quite supporting
pos_sentences.name: College Ninja

pos_sentences.text: Frequent activities and competitions are held.
pos_sentences.name: College Ninja

pos_sentences.text: College campus is very clean and hygiene
pos_sentences.name: Vishal rajpurohit

pos_sentences.text: They have projector in their every classes, so they can teach in the modern way
pos_sentences.name: Vishal rajpurohit

pos_sentences.text: Sports Computer Lab most of the students take admission here by watching tye ground mean sportsplex of our college
pos_sentences.name: Dhruv Mahendra Patil

pos_sentences.text: The faculty is good and the teachers are very understanding and friendly here a library in the library here some computer it's free any time student practice in that
pos_sentences.name: Roshni

pos_sentences.text: The principal is also very friendly and helpful
pos_sentences.name: Sajid shah

pos_sentences.text: The teachers are very good and supportive
pos_sentences.name: Sajid shah

pos_sentences.text: All the staffs are very friendly Including teachers and peon
pos_sentences.name: Vishal rajpurohit

neg_sentences.text: Campus is good but rather too small and conjusted.

neg_sentences.text: Fees payment structure is quite compicated.

neg_sentences.text: it does not have air-conditioner in the class

neg_sentences.text: They don’t have proper arrangements , timing issues are there

neg_sentences.text: The environment of the college is very bad

neg_sentences.text: The campus is very small and there is no space

neg_sentences.text: Some time they can't understand student feelings there are some teacher who's not good in teaching

neg_sentences.text: The canteen is very small and there is only two option for food
